name: Self-Care Mantras
description: A collection of mantras to help you prioritise your well-being and practice self-care.
author: David Ralph

quotes.quote: I deserve love just as I am.
Compassion flows through me effortlessly.
I am my greatest ally.
Each part of me is worthy of love.
Compassion guides my thoughts and actions
I am a source of kindness to myself.
I treat myself with gentle understanding
Every day, I grow in self-acceptance.
I am enough just as I am.
I embrace my imperfections with grace.
I choose to see the beauty within me.
I am a friend to myself in all moments.
I choose to focus on my strengths and celebrate them.
I am a valuable human being.
I am deserving of happiness and joy every day.
I am valuable and irreplaceable.
I take great care of my body.
Kindness to myself is essential.
My self-care routine is a sanctuary for my soul.
My body deserves care and attention.
Every act of self-care is a step toward my best self.
Compassion for myself strengthens my resilience.
